UpdateVpc.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency Support](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
UpdateVpc.name: VPC name. Cannot be "default". Up to 65 characters, consisting of digits, letters, and underscores.
UpdateVpc.enableIpv6: Whether to enable IPv6 CIDR block. true to enable, false to disable. If not specified, no change is made.
UpdateVpc.secondaryCidr: List of secondary CIDR blocks for the VPC. **Replacement update.**
